name: kung-commit
description: Generate conventional commit messages from your git changes using AI

kungCommit.provider.description: AI provider to use for generating commit messages

kungCommit.apiKey.markdownDescription: API key for the AI provider. Can also be set via the `KUNG_COMMIT_API_KEY` environment variable.

kungCommit.model.description: Model name to use (e.g., gpt-4o-mini for OpenAI, deepseek-chat for DeepSeek, claude-sonnet-4-20250514 for Anthropic)

kungCommit.customEndpoint.description: Custom API endpoint URL (only used when provider is 'custom')

kungCommit.customModel.description: Custom model name (only used when provider is 'custom')

kungCommit.customHeaders.markdownDescription: Additional HTTP headers for the custom endpoint

kungCommit.promptTemplate.default:
Generate a concise conventional commit message for these changes:

{{diff}}
kungCommit.promptTemplate.markdownDescription: Custom prompt template. Use `{{diff}}` as placeholder for the git diff content.

kungCommit.maxDiffChars.description: Maximum number of characters to send from the diff

kungCommit.locale.description: Locale for the generated commit message (e.g., 'en', 'ja', 'zh-CN')

kungCommit.autoPreview.description: Show a preview of the generated message before inserting it into the commit input box

kungCommit.showCodeLens.description: Show 'Generate AI Commit Message' CodeLens in diff editors

kungCommit.prPromptTemplate.default:
Generate a pull request title and description for the code changes below.

Rules:
1. The FIRST LINE must be the PR title only (max 72 characters).
2. After a blank line, provide the PR description body using Markdown.
3. Include these sections in the description:
   - ## Summary — brief overview of what this PR does
   - ## Changes — bullet list of key technical changes
   - ## Breaking Changes — note if any, or "None"
   - ## Related Issues — reference any related issues
4. Be concise but thorough. Focus on the WHAT and WHY.
5. Use present tense, imperative mood.

Branch: {{baseBranch}} -> {{headBranch}}

Changes:
{{diff}}
kungCommit.prPromptTemplate.markdownDescription: Custom prompt template for PR description generation. Use `{{diff}}`, `{{baseBranch}}`, and `{{headBranch}}` as placeholders.

kungCommit.autoOpenPRView.markdownDescription: Automatically open the GitHub PR creation view after copying the PR description to clipboard (requires `github.vscode-pull-request-github` extension).
